entry.name: terminalCommand
entry.label: Command used to attach to a session (%1 is replaced with the session name)

entry.name: previewLines
entry.label: Number of output lines captured for preview and status detection

entry.name: notifyOnWaiting
entry.label: Notify when an agent is waiting for input

entry.name: notifyOnDone
entry.label: Notify when an agent finishes working

entry.name: agentCommands
entry.label: Process names treated as AI agents, one per line
entry.default: claude codex aider opencode gemini goose amp crush cursor-agent

entry.name: workingPatterns
entry.label: Regular expressions matched against pane content meaning the agent is working, one per line
entry.default: esc to interrupt \ds · [↑↓] [\d.,]+k? tokens Esc to cancel Thinking…

entry.name: waitingPatterns
entry.label: Regular expressions matched against pane content meaning the agent waits for input, one per line
entry.default: Do you want ❯ \d+\. \(y/n\) \[Y/n\] \[y/N\] Press Enter to [Cc]ontinue\? password:
